overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic cyberpunk train from Cyberpunk 2077. The journey transitions from a station platform through elevated city tracks and into underground tunnels, with the camera switching to the opposite side of the train car midway through. The interior features distinctive green neon lighting and holographic digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic train car interior at station platform

events.description: train begins to move, departing from Westbrook station

agents.ego_description: sitting in train seat waiting for departure, observing other passengers in the car

notable_agents.action: seated passenger wearing camo pants and jacket looking at phone
seated passenger with red hair looking out the window

entered.detail: holographic green display showing WESTBROOK destination and route information
transparent sliding doors with metal frames showing platform outside
concrete platform with safety lines visible through the doors
vertical metal pole for standing passengers to hold
green upholstered bench seating along the train wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic train car with distinctive green neon lighting. The train is stationary at Westbrook station with closed doors. Two passengers are visible - one in camo pants on the left checking a phone, and one with red hair on the right. The train begins to depart around the 2-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train traveling through urban district

events.description: train exits station tunnel into bright daylight on elevated tracks
train approaches tunnel entrance ahead, natural sunlight begins to fade

agents.ego_description: riding the train as it travels at speed on elevated tracks through the city, watching urban buildings pass by the windows

notable_agents.action: passenger in camo pants continuing to look at phone while riding

entered.detail: tall modern buildings and urban architecture visible through the train windows
metal support beams and infrastructure of the elevated railway

segments.scene_description: The train emerges into bright daylight as it travels on elevated tracks through an urban district. Sunlight streams through the glass doors, illuminating the interior. City buildings and elevated track infrastructure blur past the windows as the train moves at speed. The lighting begins to dim again around 18 seconds as the train approaches another tunnel.

events.description: train enters dark underground tunnel, interior green neon lighting becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: continuing ride as train descends into dark tunnel environment

entered.detail: concrete walls of the underground tunnel passing by the windows

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark underground tunnel, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. The green neon interior lights become the primary illumination. Concrete tunnel walls pass by the glass doors as the train continues moving forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: train car interior facing opposite direction in underground tunnel

events.description: camera switches to opposite side of train car, revealing different window view and passengers
train passes through illuminated underground station platform with bright lights

agents.ego_description: riding train from opposite side of car, traveling through underground tunnels with occasional station platforms passing by

notable_agents.action: hooded passenger looking down at handheld device
passenger in camo pants talking on phone

entered.detail: large train window replacing the door view on this side of the car
dark concrete tunnel walls with occasional passing lights
illuminated platform with yellow safety lines visible during station approaches

segments.scene_description: The camera switches to the opposite side of the train car, showing a different perspective with large windows instead of doors. The train continues through dark underground tunnels illuminated by green interior lighting. Different passengers are visible on this side, including a hooded figure and the previous passenger now on the right. The train passes through an underground station platform around 45 seconds before continuing through the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey inside a futuristic train car that transitions from a stationary station platform through a sunlit urban landscape and into a dark underground network. It begins within the green neon glow of the interior at Westbrook station, where passengers wait beside closed doors before the train departs. As the vehicle emerges onto elevated tracks, the dim interior is suddenly flooded with bright daylight and views of blurring city buildings, before the light fades again as the train plunges into a concrete tunnel. The scene then shifts perspective to the opposite side of the car, where large windows reveal the oppressive darkness of the subterranean passage illuminated by artificial green light. Finally, the camera glides past a hooded figure and other passengers as the train briefly passes through an underground station platform before disappearing further into the tunnel.
